General.Name: Winto Group (Holdings) Limited
General.Description: Winto Group (Holdings) Limited, an investment holding company, provides exhibition and trade show, and publication and advertising services in the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macau Greater Bay Area. The company owns and publishes Exmoo News, a Chinese-language daily newspaper that covers various local and international news, finance and economy, entertainment, sports, fashion and lifestyle, cultural knowledge, etc.; Travel Macao, a Chinese-language travel leisure fortnightly magazine that offers information to readers relating to travel, dining, shopping, culture, and entertainment in Macau; Motoz Trader, a fortnightly magazine that focuses on new car models, the second-hand car market, and properties, as well as providing lifestyle information, including dining, fashion, and beauty; Motoz Trader (Free), a free fortnightly magazine; Shopping Monthly, a fortnightly magazine that focuses on updated information on consumer products; and Shopping Monthly (Free), a free fortnightly magazine. It also offers print and online media advertising, sells publications and magazines, outdoor advertising, and related production services; sells beauty and cosmetics products through online channels; magazines and magazines advertising services; and sells luxury products. The company was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong. Winto Group (Holdings) Limited operates as a subsidiary of Source Creation International Limited.
General.Address: Chinachem Golden Plaza, Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong
